title: Marriageyou
description: A marriage plugin that adds player-to-player marriages with proposals, divorces.
body:
# Marriageyou

**Marriageyou** is a marriage plugin for Paper/Spigot/Purpur servers that adds player-to-player relationships.  
Players can send marriage proposals, accept or deny them, divorce.

---

## 💍 Features

- 🤝 **Marriage proposals**
  - Send a proposal to another player.
  - The target player can accept or deny the request.

- 💔 **Divorce system**
  - Clean separation with configurable messages.

- 🧾 **Easy-to-read information**
  - Commands or GUI menu to see info about your current partner.
  - All messages configurable via config files.

- 🌐 **Multi-language support**
  - Available languages: Ukrainian, English and French.

---

## ⌨️ Example commands

- `/marry <player>` – send a marriage proposal.
- `/marry accept <player>` – accept a proposal.
- `/marry deny <player>` – deny a proposal.
- `/marry divorce` – request divorce confirmation.
- `/marry divorce confirm` – confirm divorce.
- `/marry info` – show all available commands.
- `/marry gui` – open the marriage menu.
- `/marry kiss` – send a kiss to your partner.
- `/marry hug` – hug your partner.
- `/marry gift` – give the item in your hand to your partner.
- `/marry anniversary` – show your marriage date and time together.
- `/marry gender <male|female|none>` – set your gender.
- `/marry gender info` – show your current gender.
- `/marry reload` – reload the plugin configuration.

## 🔖 Placeholders

- `%marriageyou_married%`
- `%marriageyou_partner%`
- `%marriageyou_gender%`
- `%marriageyou_married_since%`
- `%marriageyou_married_time%`
- `%marriageyou_status%`
- `%marriageyou_partner_online%`

---

## 📦 Compatibility

- **Core:** Paper, Spigot, Purpur (1.21.x)
- **External dependencies:** none required (plugin runs independently).
